testcase.name: Conduit E2E Flow (Extended) › should complete the full E2E flow including comments
testcase.system-out:
[32m[2026-05-08T15:35:45.975] [INFO] playwright - [39mConduitSignUpPage initialized [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:45.978] [INFO] playwright - [39mConduitSignInPage initialized with all locators [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:45.979] [INFO] playwright - [39mConduitPostPage initialized [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:46.698] [INFO] playwright - [39mSigning up user: user_1778234745111 [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:48.344] [INFO] playwright - [39mNavigating to Conduit sign-in page [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:48.911] [INFO] playwright - [39mSign-in page loaded successfully [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:48.912] [INFO] playwright - [39mPerforming sign-in with email: user_1778234745111@test.com [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:48.912] [INFO] playwright - [39mFilling email field with: user_1778234745111@test.com [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:49.017] [INFO] playwright - [39mFilling password field [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:49.117] [INFO] playwright - [39mClicking Sign In button [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:49.500] [INFO] playwright - [39mCreating post: E2E Post 1778234745111 [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:49.954] [INFO] playwright - [39mAdding comment: This is an E2E comment [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:50.158] [INFO] playwright - [39mDeleting comment [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:50.290] [INFO] playwright - [39mUpdating post to: Updated E2E Post 1778234745111 [32m[2026-05-08T15:35:50.718] [INFO] playwright - [39mDeleting post

testcase.name: Conduit E2E Flow (Extended) › should update user profile in settings
Conduit E2E Flow (Extended) › should mark an article as favorite and verify it on the profile page
testcase.system-out:

at ../src/base/BasePage.ts:37
